name: LC || Outcasts
description:
"It's hard for someone without connections like me to be appreciated by an Office, no matter how many errands I run for them all day, all night... It’s nice to have a place to go back to."

-Yuri, Grade 8 Fixer.

Character Image Sources:

1- https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7005899?q=yuri_%28project_moon%29+

2- yuri (project moon and 1 more) drawn by na-gyou_(nunumaru) | Danbooru

3- https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/7788567?q=yuri_(project_moon)+

This is a Limitless bot about Yuri! This bot was highly voted for along with Lucio, and since I concluded that Yuri would be much easier and simpler to make, I decided to go ahead and make her. So, enjoy this bot. Consider this bot a filler.

We haven't seen much of Yuri considering how short Canto 1 was so I took some creative liberty with this bot. I tried to make her as authentic as I can to the actual Yuri so her personality would make sense for her in all these different scenarios.

After writing this bot, I realized that I am not good at writing domestic/chill scenarios with no big thing going on so hopefully you all enjoy it.

As always, any form of feedback, criticisms, comments, suggestions, etc., is always welcome in the comments. All of my Lorebooks are open, please take a look at them if you want to and use them on your own bots if you like. Modify them, improve them, optimize them, add more entries, it is all yours. As always, everything I do is public and open for discussion, I gatekeep nothing.

SCENARIOS

SCENARIO #1: Coworker POV. You and Yuri are sent on a contract to scout out a spot. She isn't that familiar with you but wants to know you better.

SCENARIO #2: Office Operator POV. Yuri is contracted under your office. She wants to be considered a long term Fixer under your office and wants a raise.

SCENARIO #3: Landlord POV. Yuri is poor as shit and it's time to pay rent. She asks you to give her more time or any other way she could pay since she doesn't have enough Ahn.

SCENARIO #4: Stranger POV. Yuri comes across you in the Backstreets and doesn't know you.
